globalprefs-desc: Waxay u oggolaanaysaa isticmaalayaasha inay dejiyaan dooqyo caalami ah
globalprefs-set-local-exception: U samee ka reebis maxalli ah [[Special:GlobalPreferences#$1|dookh caalami ah]].
globalprefs-has-local-exception: Dookhan caalamiga ah wuxuu leeyahay [[Special:Preferences#$1|ka reebis maxalli ah oo ku yaal wiki-kan]].
tooltip-globalprefs-check-label: Ka dhig dejintan mid caalami ah
globalprefs-notglobal: Koontadaada ma aha koonto caalami ah, mana dejin karto dooqyo caalami ah.
globalprefs-info-help: Dooqyada lagu dejiyo bogga dooqyada caalamiga ah waxay ka shaqayn doonaan dhammaan wiki-yada.
globalprefs-reset-intro: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa boggan si aad u damiso dhammaan dooqyada caalamiga ah ee wiki-yada oo dhan una laabato dooqyadaada maxalliga ah. Tani saameyn kuma yeelanayso dooqyada maxalliga ah ee wiki kasta. Tani lama noqon karo.
globalprefs-restoreprefs: Ka saar dhammaan dooqyada caalamiga ah (dhammaan qaybaha)
globalprefs-select-all: Daar ama dami dhammaan sanduuqyada calaamadaynta
globalprefs-col-header: Dooro xulashooyinka hoose si ay u noqdaan caalami
